    },
    {

      "args": [],

    {
      "name": "mixed_numbers",
      "input": [-1, 2, -3],
      "output": -2,
      "args": [],

    },
    {
      "name": "zero_case",

      "output": 0,
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests the function with all zeros."
    },
    {
      "name": "large_numbers",
      "input": [1000000, 2000000, 3000000],
      "output": 6000000,
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests the function with large integers."
    },
    {
      "name": "single_element",
      "input": [42],
      "output": 42,
      "args": [],

      "notes": "Tests the function with a single integer."
    },
    {
      "name": "empty_input",
      "input": [],
      "output": 0,
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests the function with an empty input array."
    },
    {
      "name": "adversarial_case",
      "input": [1, -1, 1, -1, 1],
      "output": 1,
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests the function with alternating positive and negative numbers."
    }
  ],
  "assumptions": "Input will always be a list of integers.",
